lead_theme.theme_title: AI coding tools are becoming strategic infrastructure assets, triggering massive valuation bets and competitive positioning moves
lead_theme.conviction: Builders should treat AI coding tools as platform-layer infrastructure, not SaaS products — the Cursor/$60B option and xAI exclusive contract signal that distribution lock-in via developer tooling is now worth infrastructure-scale capital, meaning founders building in this space must think about exclusivity and strategic acquirer value from day one

all_themes.theme_title: Anthropic's opaque pricing changes on Claude Code are creating real market confusion and competitive vulnerability
all_themes.conviction: Any team budgeting AI coding tools into their stack right now faces genuine pricing uncertainty from Anthropic — builders should either lock in contracts, hedge with OpenAI Codex, or build abstraction layers that make switching costs low, because Anthropic's silent tier changes signal pricing instability is not over
